Call ID: EXT-021
Type: external
Date: 2026-01-12
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Marcus (account manager); Tomás (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Marcus): Hi Tomás, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Tomás): The reporting is powerful but the learning curve is steep.
AM (Marcus): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Tomás): Numbers matter to us — show me the impact.
AM (Marcus): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Tomás): I feel better about the direction. Let's check in again soon.
AM (Marcus): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
